review_text: Great stay
Great location with amazing views of the coastline. Friendly staff with local knowledge of the great spots and things to do. Dog friendly too.
Great place to stay family friendly, dig friendly close to the beach and shops

I arrived at the venue at approx. 8.15 p.m. feeling rather tired.||I used the code that Reflections advised me via email to successfully open the key safe and obtain my envelope.||I opened the envelope to find the cabin key and access instructions.||I keyed the Boom Gate Code 825454#, as advised on the instruction sheet, five times. The boom gate didn't respond.||I called their after hours number 0499 824 865. I received a voice message service. I left a message to call me as I couldn't gain access to the property.||I didn't receive a call back.||Eventually, and very fortunately, another guest drove in behind me. He kindly used his code and the boom gate lifted.||I called their after hours number again as I wanted to pop out to get some dinner. I got a voice message service again. I left another voice message to call me. I didn't receive a call back.||I didn't want to leave the property to get dinner as I feared I wouldn't be able to re-enter with the Boom Gate Code that didn't work, so I went to bed without having eaten.||Not a very good night's sleep.||I still haven't received a call back.||I do understand that whoever has their after hours mobile device needs to sleep. So do I.||A very annoying, frustrating and disappointing experience.
Close to beach, dog friendly. Good place to stay.

10/10 spot with really helpful staff. Tucked away on the coast so it doesn’t get too loud and rowdy. The facilities are clean and tidy and have everything you’d need. The grounds are very beautiful and the beach is too.

A lovely quiet caravan park. Different to other beachfront caravan parks as it is on the headland about 50m above the beach. This means each row of caravans are set back down the hill, one level behind the one in front. This gives the sites a lovely sense of privacy as you looked out the back over the top of the caravans behind you. Small caravan park with basic facilities and gravel roads. Not really worth bringing the bikes. Clean amenities block and excellent service. Small camp kitchen had all the basics and also a bbq up on top of the headland within the park, with breathtaking views nearby. A walking track takes you down to the beach, with a slight decline for the first 200m, then a steeper decent for the final 50m. Very cute walkway. Great to have dog washing facilities and a car wash area. Dog beach is great open untouched beach, shared with infrequent 4wd access. Flags are a 5-10 minute walk away from caravan park.
Such a nice place. The care takers and staff were amazing and so lovely they were really knowledgeable about activities in the area. Made our stay welcoming and very enjoyable. Beautiful people.

Bit of a hike to the beach down a steep bush track. Wifi basically doesn’t work. Bad reception there in general. Lovely green spaces though with large trees for shade and bird life everywhere. Limited amenities for kids but the nature can take care of that. Gorgeous views from the top of the hill where you can watch the sea eagles flying. Lovely ladies at the front desk. Toilets are dated but spacious and clean. Water is hot but pressure low. Camp kitchen is very basic, no gas cookers. Enjoyed our time

Had an 8 night stay here from Boxing day.
Ideal location, dog friendly close to clubs restaurants shops etc. Beautiful views from the cliffs
Park reasonably well kept but I have to say our powered site was by far the worst I have had in any of the reflections parks we have stayed in. Site run parallel to the road and we had to put the van on the edge of the road to give us enough room to extend our awning out. Our view was the garbage dumpsters and the toilets. This time of year the bins were constantly filled and the smell from these were unacceptable as well as the constant noise from people emptying cans and bottles into recycle bins. Overall our stay was not as enjoyable as expected having stayed at other reflections holiday parks.
If you are making a booking avoid site 17

Great spot for our wind up camper. The park is big with lots of open space, it was full during the holidays but didn't feel crowded. The kids rode their bikes around, the dog had space to run, and there is a track out the back to a fantastic dog beach. Great spot for pooches. There was a pizza van on the Friday, and some kids activities (mine did some planting - they had a great time.) The staff are really friendly and helpful. The facilities are clean and close to everyone. All very laid back and well run. Would definitely stay again.
Great location and wonderful cabins.

Stopped in again for a visit and this is still our favourite spot in Nambucca. The staff are incredible, Charlie and Rhys look after the grounds and facilities and deserve a promotion more than ever. The facilities ate spotless and they are always on hand to help out or just share a yarn.
The positive energy they bring to their work is infectious 🙂. The most incredible beach is a short walk away from the sites. The admin staff are just awesome too and always accommodate our  requests. We will be back soon. Thank you guys for an incredible week in paradise 🙂.

Fantastic, great location, clean accommodation, great for the dogs, overlooking the cliff and ocean, close to beach and swimming and restaurants.  Couldn't fault the place.  Carolyn is terrific, friendly and helpful, and the other staff were outstanding, the cleaner, maintenance and reception (but don't remember their names).  If you want a great place to stay go to Reflections Nambucca

2025 Alles wie damals, sehr nett und gepflegt. Sanitäranlagen ausreichend viele und sehr ordentlich. Die Anlage sieht gepflegt aus und die Rezeption hat auch bis 17 Uhr geöffnet. Wir fühlten uns sehr wohl.

2019 Netter Caravan Park mit eigenem Zugang zum schönen Strand. Die Anlage befindet sich recht schön in der Natur. Sanitäranlagen sind alt aber sauber. Es gibt mehrere Stellplätze auf neuen Betonplatten und das Personal ist super nett.
Great place in a beautiful scenic area, just beautiful ✌️👍

A quiet retreat that’s definitely worth upgrading to a larger cabin. The customer service is friendly, and the location is ideal — peaceful town with convenient access to the beach through Reflections Park.

An older Caravan Park naturally as it has brilliant scenery over the ocean & beautiful beaches !
Small cabins are clean & bed comfortable ! Staff are human & friendly which is hard to find these days 😕
Nice spot, friendly staff 👌. Place needs an upgrade but. Kinda outdated. Nice experience overall 👌 👍

Great location and clean amenities.
Reflections loyalty program is also good.
The hill up from the beach is steep, but well worth it.

We loved our one night stay in cabin 4 with our dog Tara. All the staff were really friendly and accommodating. Great to do a load of washing (fee applies). Free dog wash also. The walk to dog off leash beach was steep but well worth it. Nice toilettries. Porch had nice new furniture and doggy gate. Great !!

Had a great unplanned stay here… after the rains many sites closed and muddy as was everywhere across the state. The lady at desk ket me chose from what was available.. even if a bit tight for our van…great little park on the hill above the main beach with beautiful grounds and very serviceable and clean ammenities.  Lots of trees and BBQ areas scattered around.

While I have read some bad reviews they were clearly related to the old management. Staff were fantastic, Charlie and Reese the grounds keepers were great for a chat and are underpaid😜. It’s the best spot in town and not far to walk if you’re are reasonably fit.
The gardens are beautiful with so many trees and eco systems and fantastic school holiday programs. You can view the whales passing if you’re there at the right time of year. The new management is making great changes to existing run down buildings to help bring it back to its former glory. We are looking forward to coming back and seeing what they have done.
Also the surf club isn’t far and has great coffee and meals.

Great value, clean cabins on an amazing headland - what a treat! Short bush track to the beach; big ocean views; well maintained facilities that are well managed by a friendly, professional team. I had a great five days here and I'll be back. Gracias!
Awesome spot, very tranquil setting,  loved hearing the ocean, and bird's.|The staff very friendly.|Very comfortable stay for mini break
Booked an unpowered campsite for 2 nights! The staff and management are very friendly and helpful. Facilities are all clean and well kept. Great location, would definitely stay here again!
Lovely place to stay in caravan nestled in bush settings   staff very friendly  amenities well kept  property well maintained   thanks nambucca heads

The location was spot on.. Amazing  ocean views opposite "Sunrise cabins"  & not far from town. |Non refundable full amount was asked on booking and 3pm checkin.  I  was not impressed with either.|Comfy bed, very small bathroom with hot shower. 2 TV's..  The kitchen was good but the living area not so good. It was very lacking. One two seater lounge and no table to eat at. Not even a coffee table. 2 tables on verandah but it was too cold to eat out there. Who wants to sit out there to eat in the middle of winter? Not even any spare sheets to make up the bunk if needed. Overall I was a bit disappointed.
Booked for a person experiencing homelessness, great care and attention was taken and very happy

Terrible experience
Cabin was so filthy upon arrival spoke with management who were rude then found alternate place to stay

This was the tightest park ive been in but my set up is 12 metres long still had little trouble getting in and out.
Staff were very friendly and helpful and the location was amazing

5 stars ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

I had a fantastic stay at Reflections Caravan Park in Nambucca Heads! The location is absolutely unbeatable – just steps from the beach, with a beautiful coastal walk that takes you all the way to The V Wall. The amenities were spotless, and the entire site was really well-maintained. The staff were friendly, welcoming, and always happy to help.

The only downside would be the cost of the laundry facilities – $7 for a wash and $8 for a dry felt a bit steep. But overall, it didn’t take away from the great experience. Highly recommend, and I’ll definitely be back next time I’m in the area!

We had a beautiful little cabin on the hill with ocean views. It was absolutely beautiful. The cabin was clean and tidy with lots of amenities. Such a beautiful little town and staying at Reflections just made it even better. The groundskeepers were lovely they stopped and chatted to us for a while and told us some good little spots to visit. Check in and check out was easy and fast. Highly recommend

Stayed in a cabin. Very old fixtures, looked like it was outfitted in the 50"s. No view. Long walk down path to the beach.|Definitely overpriced.|I speak from experience staying in many caravan parks along the NSW coast. |Would not come back again
We absolutely loved it here!! Dog friendly and human friendly too!! Beautiful setting!!

We had the best time here for a week! Our cabin was set in a magical setting…. green trees and lovely green grass. We were in a dog friendly cabin. Our pooch very much felt at home and LOVED the nearby off leash doggie beach too! The staff went out of their way to be friendly and helpful. We will definitely stay again if we are down here in the future and will highly recommend to our friends.
Wonderful friendly staff...the grounds are excellent...so spacious  and emenities very clean...only drawback is it is a bit of a hilly walk to beach
Great park in a great spot with friendly service. We love coming here and staying in a dog friendly cabin with our dog.

We tent camped on powered sites for 3 nights, with 4 other families. The sites were a reasonable size, grassy and flat. There was a large open field across from us where the kids enjoyed running around and playing ball games. Facilities were clean. Staff were friendly. We especially loved that it was close to the beach.

Schöner, naturbelassener Campground etwas abseits vom Zentrum, aber in perfekter Lage an der Steilküste zum langen Sandstrand. Dank der terrassenförmigen Anlage wohnt man mitten in der Natur. Sanitärbereich schon etwas älter, aber gepflegt. Uns hat der Campground wegen der Lage sehr gut gefallen.

Such good value as this park is inexpensive. Really clean and tidy and our cabin was very comfortable. Great for dogs as it is a short walk to dog beach. Staff always friendly and helpful too. Happy to recommend. This park has everything you need and 5 minute drive to town.

Fantastic, great people.
The perfect place to holiday with your dog.

This place is great. Amazing private cabin with ocean view. You can even bring your dogs. Usually when you stay in a cabin at a caravan park, privacy is minimal- but we could leave all wi does and blinds open with no problem. Path to beach. Clean and quiet. Could easily stay here for a few weeks. Would be even better if there was a pool!
Really lovely, laid back, dog friendly site. The grounds and facilities are immaculate - thanks to Charlie and Reece.
The only downside was washer/dryer prices 7/8 aud - the highest of all our 18 days stays at different campgrounds
Amazing place. Beautiful beach 5 min away. Private spots and very quiet. Amenities clean and not crowded at all. Pet friendly and they even have a dog bath 😀. Loved it!

Decent location and sites were a good size. However we were extremely disappointed with the cleanliness of the facilities. There was a clump of hair in a female shower for five days (even longer if it was there before us) and in the men’s someone shaved and there was hair for three days. Wouldn’t go back to this location.
Great place to stay - do as much or as little as you want. Great location, pet friendly - we’ll definitely be back!

We had an amazing stay at Reflections Nambucca Heads. A beautiful Park, friendly, great staff, natural, peaceful....so relaxing. So close to all everything, beaches, shops, dining, great fishing.

Thanks for a great time - the Stubbs family

Spectacular location nestled in the cliffs!
Travelled with my partner and our dog, the walking tracks around the area were amazing. And shout out to Charlie for the recommendation for the Sunday Session at the Surf Club, it was a great way to spend the afternoon on the beach.
did not stay but the staff was VERY nice, friendly & helpful

Communication was poor. We tried numerous times to ring & get in contact. It was impossible. ||Upon arrival the rooms weren’t clean properly. There was dog hair over the lounge. Floors & shower weren’t clean.||The location of the park is lovely & quiet.

Steep access, tiny sites.No phone reception . No starlink access due to steep incline covered in trees.No idea how you would get a caravan  in unless you were at an end site.
Bathroom says save water 3 minutes only but then inside shower says run the water  if you want it to be hot. Took 4 minutes of turning on a second shower and hand basin water to get water that was colder than body temperature.
Sites have power and water, but would have been more comfortable stopping at rest stop.

We will never stay at this park again have been travelling for 14 years and have never stayed at a worst park it was very disappointing 😞 not a good review for the Reflections group. I would rather stay in a paddock at least that way we wouldn't of wasted our money.

Lovely stay at Nambucca Heads with nice amenities and a good location.
Thanks to Charlie for swinging around and helping us with our pack-up!

Fantastic holiday park in a great location, amenities were really clean and the grounds really neat and tidy. The location next to the beach was excellent as we have our dog with us and she loves a walk and a swim. The scenery around this area is breathtaking. Special shout out to Charlie who is the new manager, he was excellent giving us tips on the local area. Also Heather who was in the office, a dog lover and made us feel welcome.

Stayed over a weekend in September. Very quiet, which benefited us! Lovely camp grounds, though we were at the sites at the back which is a long, steep walk to the bathrooms. Perhaps not suitable for the elderly but I can't complain too much because they allowed us to have 2 cars on the one site. You're in a prime location and you can walk everywhere. Lots of steep hills so be prepared! Only thing I didn't like is the technology used to operate the washing machines. The screen froze which was frustrating. Internet was good though, and facilities were very clean. Nice to meet you, Charlie!
Excellent place to relax and minutes from the beach and allow dogs to stay as well 😀

Clean, peaceful park with a really friendly office lady!
Everything was enjoyable, we just needed a simple overnight stay for our swag, cheap pricing considering we got wifi, toilets and showers and camp kitchen equipped with everything!

We are generally budget travellers and are well pleased with our cabin. Older style and not cosmetically perfect but has such a relaxing vibe about it. Spacious studio with bonus large lounge with chaise. Bathroom is very nice, huge shower. Everything you need is provided. We travel with plenty of gear so the abundance of space to put our bags out of the way was welcome. There are some very nice cabins for reasonable rates, as well as nice powered and unpowered sights. Friendly staff, nice park.

Very friendly staff who were so helpful.  I'm sure I will be back.

Qube driver

I'd recommend staying at Ingenia instead. I stayed at both caravan parks during my visit and while Ingenia is slightly more expensive, the staff are much more helpful and accommodating, the facilities are nicer, and the location more central.

Could not recommend more. The park manager was very kind, welcoming and helpful throughout our stay. Had one of the best views of the morning sky looking over the Beach. Cabin was very clean and decent size of a short stay.

Our stay at Reflections Holiday Park in Nambucca Heads was awful. The manager was incredibly rude, harassing and yelling at us and using offensive language, We were just a group of 11 people having a BBQ and some music at lunch time , but we were treated very bad. The park clearly lacks proper customer service training. If you're thinking about staying here, please reconsider. We will never return to any Reflections Holiday Parks

A horrible unfriendly caravan park with a rude, arrogant Park Manager
Over 10 years of caravanning and my wife and I have stayed in quite a few Reflections caravan parks during that time, without ever having an issue. BUT then we made the mistake of booking a family birthday holiday for 3 caravans at Reflections - Nambucca Heads. The park itself is pretty ordinary to say the least but one of the sites they gave us was way too narrow to have a caravan with an annex on the side. The site was located in-between a fence and a roadway which carries main traffic through to a number of cabins. When fitted, their annex would have been sitting right on the edge of the gravel roadway, if not protruding out onto the roadway itself. This was a highly unsafe situation and NOT one they were not going to accept. When a request was made to be relocated to another site, the park Manager got involved and claimed that we had upset her office girl (without providing any justifiable evidence of that claim) and then pretty much implied “that’s your site, you're not moving to another site so like it or lump it”
Based on the dangerous location and the Manager’s belligerent attitude, that family member made the decision to leave Reflections Holiday Park and relocate to the Ingenia White Albatross holiday park. The so called “Park Manager” then had the hide to charge them a cancellation fee. So, we now have a family holiday split over two caravan parks. At this point, she must be quite proud of herself. I then requested a credit be issued for my own site. She blatantly refused and I had to forfeit two prepaid nights so I could also relocate to the Ingenia Park together with the third family caravan. Considering the Reflections Park was very empty at the time, it would only have taken a little bit of common sense and a little bit of flexibility from the Manager, and she could have retained our business.
The end result was that our family group booked a combined 16 nights at the Ingenia White Albatross holiday park which is clearly a better-quality park run by staff and management that have a much higher understanding of customer service.
So, goodbye Reflections Nambucca Heads. Here’s three caravanning families who will never stay at your park again and for that matter will more than likely end up excluding many of the other Reflections Holiday Parks throughout our future travels.
I urge people to read other reviews on Reflections Nambucca Heads because it’s clear we are not the only customers to experience this woman’s rude, arrogant and highly abrasive attitude to customer service.
There's unquestionably a valid reason why this park was empty.
Nice and quiet

Love visiting Nambucca Hds and it's always a pleasure that we stay at Reflections on the Headland of Nambucca Hds,  for the views the tranquil surroundings and of course the amazing sea views.
It's location is ideal as it's all in a walking distance or a short drive to anything that is in the township.
Can't wait to return on our next travels.
Clean amenities, roomy sites, quiet, great walks, close to town.
Lovely spot. Our site nestled into the trees. Only steps from the ocean. Quiet park, well maintained. Will stay here again on our next visit.

I won’t ever return to this park. The park manager is the rudest person I have ever encountered at a caravan park. Our sites were no where near the size we were told. We were told there were trees behind us which would give us more room, it was a bamboo hedge.

She snapped at our party from the moment we arrived and was rude to our children whenever they encountered her. Absolutely disgusting behaviour.

The groundsman was the only member of staff who was kind and loved our dog. He let him into his buggy and was a genuinely friendly person. He was understanding of how we were treated and empathetic.

The amenities may have been ‘cleaned’ daily, but that is using the term loosely.

Until they adjust the attitude of the woman running the place, i would avoid this place unless you enjoy being treated like rubbish while spending your hard earned money to stay there.

Comfortable,  clean , peaceful  cabins .
Spectacular  views.
Will definitely  stop here again.
Wonderful dog friendly caravan park in a beautiful location on the coast. Excellent well maintained facilities.

I won't be back.  Reception lady rude upon me checking in.  They obviously don't like dogs as she wanted my small dog to remain in the car whilst I checked in and it was extremely hot.  No need to speak to me like she did.  Second day, whilst walking my dog in the grassed area, male worker pulled up in his cart and just stared at me.  Very uncomfortable. Day 4 male worker starts mowing at 8 am for an hour in front of where I'm camping waking most people up.  I paid over 500 for a week to have a break not to come to a place where staff are rude.

We booked a couple of dog friendly cabins for a family birthday celebration. The smaller dog cabins were small, the bunk beds were super tiny, younger kids only, our young adult was uncomfortable. The lounge was ok, tiny tv. Aircon was strong, master bed was very comfortable. The large 5 bed dog cabin had more space. In both cases, the decks were the best aspect and where we spent the most time. Kitchens have everything you need, no oven though in the cabins or the camp kitchen.  Bbq is available and works well.  Management of the park is active, there are surveillance cameras and they are actively monitored for especially dog rules like on-leash and camp kitchen exclusion. The park is near the beach if you are a seagull, humans will need to descend a very steep path or drive down to the beach.  The location is amazing, view from the top cabins is incredible, we saw sea Eagles, black cockatoos and the full moon over the ocean was next level.
A big shout out to Heather at reception, customer service skills were excellent.Its nice to receive such quality assistance!

Stayed 4 nights in the Caravan Park , Really only one complaint phone service was terrible, not the park’s fault, amenities are clean , Park is very quiet and handy to the beach ,(bit of a hike down a steep path to the beach) Shady sites 1.5 klm walk into town
Great little park in a stunning location

Everyone and everything about this camp ground was horrible.
I’ve never met such rude staff in my life, very unprofessional and very rude.
Have a look at the other bad reviews and they are spot on.

Just wow. I’ve never been to a place with more rude, condescending management in my life. If you want piece of mind book some where else.
Negative 5 star.

Got a dog friendly cabin, very clean and a good layout. Friendly staff. As we were just staying for one night it was great. Situated close too the beach, but rain kept us away. Internet access is very poor, even your phone my not work? strange as in town?

To say that the management was rude would be an understatement. We should have taken the hint from the first phone call we made trying to book for the weekend. If I was to return to Nambucca again, it definitely wouldn’t be to come back to this place. Plenty of other nice places to stay!

Staff are unwelcoming and plain rude. Very uncomfortable feeling from the get go at reception. Not the way you would like to be treated on a holiday. Will never return to this dump. Would not recommend staying here.

We recently stayed in a dog friendly cabin. Cabin is immaculate. Best bed I’ve slept in. Very peaceful. Great location. Staff are fantastic. So affordable compared to other places. Absolute bargain. Highly recommend.
Cabin we stayed in was clean and well maintained. The park in located right on the headlands with excelent ocean views.

This was our first holiday in many many years we were on our  way home just left Queensland visiting my too big brothers and there family's and this was a last minute to pull in at reflection we had a caravan my hubby and myself and a dog my hubby and I thought know way they would have a vacancy but they did we were in for a treat we  saw our first humpback whale's plus dolphins playing in the surf it was the magical🥹🥹back to reflection I did not have enough time so I will be back with the rest of my family !!this place is beautiful the amenities were so clean it smells clean there was nothing out of place but the biggest tick is my Matilda (my dog)was aloud it's hard to find places that allow pets you guy's are awesome A Big thankyou from ny Hubby and Myself and Matilda 😁😁😁😁
Rude and aggressive hosts with poor customer service skills. There is no way I would recommend or stay again.
Absolute dump. Filthy cabins. The staff are incredibly rude. I would not recommend.
Fantastic rooms and views ... not to mention the staff were helpful, kind and welcoming.
